title: athroandra africana
intro: Athroandra africana, also known as the African devil tree, is a tropical plant native to the tropical forests of East Africa. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Athroandra africana include its potential to treat skin conditions, such as eczema and acne, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be applied topically as a cream or ointment to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
